3055810.name: Sky Bound Hero
3055810.description:
Sky Bound Hero invites you to take flight as Aeris, a swift and graceful hero born for the skies. Glide through breathtaking, vibrant worlds filled with serene beauty and hidden challenges. Your mission? Collect power capsules scattered across the skies before time runs out—but how you fly is entirely up to you.

Whether you’re darting through the clouds with lightning speed or peacefully exploring every corner of the world, Sky Bound Hero lets you set the pace. Each level brings new obstacles and opportunities to test your reflexes and sharpen your strategy, all wrapped in stunning visuals and immersive soundscapes.

So take a deep breath, spread your wings, and soar.
Can you help Aeris master the skies?
3055810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
